untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'multiple clean tests' and 'clearly visible support/resistance levels' which are qualitative market structure concepts. The allowed indicators cannot reliably identify historically-tested price levels or cluster analysis of tests. Pivot points are used as a proxy for obvious levels, but true level detection and multi-test validation would require custom level-detection logic outside the indicator set.
translation_notes: Approximated using pivot (obvious level), price_pos_20 (proximity to level), and hvol_20 (volume confirmation on breakout). Direction is context-dependent: entry conditions work for both LONG (above level) and SHORT (below level). For production use, integrate a level-detection algorithm that identifies clustered price tests.
